---
title: "GRADE Evidence Profiles"
aliases:
  - /reviews/grade/
---

```{r}
source(here::here("R/utils.R"))
grade <- read_grade_data()
```

```{r}
#| results: asis
if (nrow(grade) == 0) {
  cli::cat_line("No GRADE assessments available yet.")
} else {
  certainty_colours <- c(
    high       = "#28a745",
    moderate   = "#daa520",
    low        = "#fd7e14",
    `very low` = "#dc3545"
  )

  grade$group <- dplyr::coalesce(grade$domain, grade$search_topic, "other")
  grade$group <- gsub("_", " ", grade$group) |> tools::toTitleCase()

  display_cols <- intersect(
    c("outcome", "n_studies", "n_participants", "effect_estimate", "certainty"),
    names(grade)
  )
  display_names <- c(
    outcome = "Outcome",
    n_studies = "Studies",
    n_participants = "Participants",
    effect_estimate = "Effect Estimate",
    certainty = "Certainty"
  )[display_cols]

  grade$outcome <- sub("^[^:]+:\\s*", "", grade$outcome)

  for (grp in unique(grade$group)) {
    cli::cat_line(glue::glue("\n\n## {grp}\n"))
    sub <- grade[grade$group == grp, , drop = FALSE]
    df <- sub[, display_cols, drop = FALSE]
    names(df) <- display_names[display_cols]

    tbl <- display_table(df)

    if ("Certainty" %in% names(df)) {
      for (cert in names(certainty_colours)) {
        rows <- which(tolower(df$Certainty) == cert)
        if (length(rows) > 0) {
          tbl <- tbl |>
            gt::tab_style(
              style = list(
                gt::cell_text(color = certainty_colours[cert], weight = "bold")
              ),
              locations = gt::cells_body(columns = "Certainty", rows = rows)
            )
        }
      }
    }

    print(gt::as_raw_html(tbl))
  }
}
```
